subcodes.first_line: The divines, the mystics and the rulers of the earth await, night and day, the moment when the horizon of the world shall be illumined with light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علما و عرفا و امرای ارض در لیالی و ایام منتظر که چه هنگام افق عالم بانوار
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
